itemListElement.reviewBody: 3 stars because of FIITJEE, the 2 missing stars are because of the quality of MVM as a school by itself, which is absolute trash.

itemReviewed.name: Maharishi Vidya Mandir Senior Secondary School - Chetpet

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Always partiality. Actual talent is not respected here. Only attraction and decorations are their policy.

No good ground.

Canteen has all junks foods which they object us to send will be given there.

Poor responses from teachers.

itemReviewed.name: Maharishi Vidya Mandir Senior Secondary School - Chetpet

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Note: This is about the school canteen

My 3 year old niece goes to school 🏫🎒 here. The canteen here serves all kinds of junk food. It shows that the school is not bothered about the health of the kids studying here

itemReviewed.name: Maharishi Vidya Mandir Senior Secondary School - Chetpet

itemListElement.reviewBody:
This was my school , I studied here from LKG - Tenth . I am writing this review nearly after 19 years of completing my school days. I was an average student . I personally felt this school teachers was caste biased and economic biased to students. one teacher his name is Mr.vidyadharan (maths teacher )I will never forget this name in my lifetime . He will hit the students to near death . If this would had happened to nowadays kids he would have been in jail. This school spoiled my whole childhood . I had depression, inferiority and anxiety because of the teachers at MVM .Still I feel the pain even after  20yrs horrible life at mvm .  They say Jai guru dev ... Here most of the teachers were like evil spirits. These teachers will demotivate the students still I remember Mr. vidyadharan came and said to me you will fail in this exam on the morning of tenth public exam. Wish I could meet him once again in my life.
Not sure if they changed their attitude now but I can say this is one of the worst school for average and students from low economic background. If you are rich they treat you well. Money minded demons !! I completed my school here in the year 2005. But I will never forget how this school treated me for lifetime.

itemReviewed.name: Maharishi Vidya Mandir Senior Secondary School - Chetpet

itemListElement.reviewBody:
VERY WORST RESPONSE
I have been enquiring for the Yoga session to the person called Suresh. He has been postponing for the past 6 months that he is not available in Chennai. After 6 months he is informing that he is not taking yoga classes in the school. He doesn't have a basic discipline on what to communicate and when. I don't think he is deserve to conduct Yoga classes anywhere as he doesn't have any basic sense or discipline.

itemReviewed.name: Maharishi Vidya Mandir Senior Secondary School - Chetpet

itemListElement.reviewBody:
In simple words
HORRIBLE SCHOOL WITH HORRIBLE TEACHERS.
This school will humiliate average students and will create a sense of inferiority complex among students.
TEACHERS ARE EQUIVALENT TO GODDESS SARASWATHI ( Do not spoil your name by acting like  demons). Do not humiliate teenage children. TREAT THEM WELL. Be polite in your approach. Be like a Guru not like a Demon.

Especially One Teacher name I will say , she was ms.sakthipriya , when my child was in 8th , she put on strees on my son f

itemReviewed.name: Maharishi Vidya Mandir Senior Secondary School - Chetpet

itemListElement.reviewBody: No proper coaching given by MVM chetpet for the board exam class 12(22-23) cbse batch. No presence of teachers during coaching classes, instead the teachers go for meeting and return for the last 15 minutes of the class.

itemReviewed.name: Maharishi Vidya Mandir Senior Secondary School - Chetpet

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I feel lucky that I have studied in this school .....this school has lots of beautiful memories. The Teachers are So Friendly. Teachers Teach With  A Great Energy And They Make Learning So Easy. This School as Good Infrastructure Too....... Coming To Sports ⚽ They Give Importance to Sports Especially For Boys. I Studied Here For 12 Years From LKG To 10th STD. MVM is not a word it's full of emotions. "2022-2023 10th Batch" - This was full of joy. We handled 10th without any pressure and it was so pleasant. I think this makes MVM so special.I would highly recommend MVM for All. MVM stays in my heart forever. Atleast once in a year for sure i ll come and meet my teachers. I don't have the words hereafter to express but it's okay not even words can fullfill my emotions and gratitude towards MVM CHEPET.
Thank You
